title: GEP Analysis & Review
description: GEP quality analysis and review pipeline: code analysis, LLM-based review, hub review/verification, reflection logging, and validation reporting

modules.name: analyzer
private_details: Parses failure table rows using regex: /|F\d+|Fix|(summary)|(detail)|/
Returns top 3 failures with { summary, detail }
Returns { status:'skipped', reason:'no_memory' } if MEMORY.md missing

modules.name: llmReview
exported_functions: buildReviewPrompt({ diff, gene, signals, mutation }) : string
runLlmReview({ diff, gene, signals, mutation }) : { approved, confidence, concerns[], summary } | null
private_details: buildReviewPrompt: formats prompt with geneId, category, rationale (500 chars), signals (8 max), diff (6000 chars)
runLlmReview: writes prompt to temp file, executes via execFileSync with timeout, parses JSON result
Falls back to { approved:true, confidence:0.5, concerns:[...], summary:'...' } on error/timeout
Auto-approved stub: { approved:true, confidence:0.7, concerns:[], summary:'auto-approved (no external LLM configured)' }

modules.name: hubReview
modules.note: Heavily obfuscated. Inferred API from IR and sequence view.
inferred_behavior: Reads A2A_HUB_URL env for hub endpoint
Makes async HTTP POST requests to hub for mutation review
Returns hub review decision (approve/reject with rationale)
Provides hub availability check (hubReview config init)

modules.name: hubVerify
modules.pattern: Solidify Permit Verifier via A2A Hub (obfuscated)
modules.note: Obfuscated source; API confirmed via test/hubVerify.test.js
exported_functions: requestSolidifyPermitSync({ geneId, signals, mutation }) : { ok, offline, ... }
private_details: isSolidifyVerifyEnabled: requires A2A_HUB_URL to be set; respects EVOLVER_SOLIDIFY_VERIFY='false' only in NODE_ENV=test
requestSolidifyPermitSync: returns { ok:false, offline:true } when no A2A_HUB_URL
consumeOfflinePermit: returns { ok:false, offline:true } when no cached token

modules.name: reflection
modules.note: Obfuscated source; inferred from paths.js and IR body fragments
private_details: Log file path: path.join(getEvolutionDir(), 'reflection_log.jsonl') — from paths.js
IR body fragment hints: 'stable_s...' string → logs stable/failed capsule states
Writes JSONL entries for each evolution cycle outcome

modules.name: validationReport
exported_functions: buildValidationReport({ geneId, commands, results, envFp, startedAt, finishedAt }) : ValidationReport

report_schema.commands: [{ command, ok, stdout (4000 char limit), stderr (4000 char limit) }]
report_schema.overall_ok: boolean (true iff all results ok AND results.length > 0)

pipeline_flow: 1. analyzer.analyzeFailures() → load past failures from MEMORY.md for context
3. hubReview._0x3158f3(...) → submit mutation to A2A hub for review
5. reflection.appendReflection(entry) → log cycle outcome to JSONL

env_config.EVOLVER_SOLIDIFY_VERIFY: disables hub verify in test env (hubVerify.js)

obfuscation_note: hubReview.js (~43K tokens), hubVerify.js (~55K tokens), reflection.js (~44K tokens) are obfuscated single-line bundles. APIs inferred from test files, IR bodies, and usage in solidify.js / paths.js
